prompt: Write segment 6 (THE ROI CALCULATION, Day 9) of the openpatent.ai 10-segment cold-outreach sequence, tuned for the **ai_startup** persona — a seed-to-Series-B AI lab where the IP is model weights, fine-tunes, and the training pipeline. The email must (a) be ≤150 words in the body (excluding signature footer), (b) name the 6 layers of the disclosure as applied to AI assets (title = model name, description = architecture summary, drawings = architecture diagram, prototype = weights commit hash, contributor hash = author/committer registry, chain receipt = Bitcoin OP_RETURN anchor), (c) make one specific dollar comparison: cost of one OTS disclosure vs. cost of one day of trade-secret litigation ($47,000–$250,000 defense), (d) name the Atelier tier ($99/mo, pre-Series A) and the Sovereign tier ($999/mo, post-Series A) with the right cap-table framing, and reference the Founder's Mark ($9,999/yr) as the long-game option, (e) close with one specific CTA: 'reply with a one-line answer and I'll send the comparison sheet'. Researcher-to-researcher tone. Use 'weights', 'fine-tunes', 'evals', 'model card' — the right words. No 'AI-powered', no 'next-generation'. The email must end with this exact signature: 'The hive remembers. The dragon knows. The sovereign companion never forgets.' Return ONLY the email as plain text. Do not include the unsubscribe footer (it is added automatically).
